title: Study and training support loans
description: Explains income contingent loans for undertaking higher education, trade apprenticeships and other training programs.
keywords: students, studying, study, HECS-HELP, SFSS, hecs debt, TSL, trade support loan, student loan, HECS balance, VET Student Loan, VSL, Study and training loan, STSL

child_links.title: How study and training support loans work
child_links.description: A brief overview of how study and training support loans work, including a video.

child_links.title: Types of loans
child_links.description: You can find a number of loans available from the Australian Government to help you complete further training and study.

child_links.title: View your study loan account online
child_links.description: How to use the ATO app or ATO online services to view your study or training support loan account.

child_links.title: When you must repay your loan
child_links.description: You must start repaying your loan when your repayment income exceeds the minimum repayment threshold.

child_links.title: Tell your employer about your study or training loan
child_links.description: How to tell your employer about your study or training support loan, and why it's important.

child_links.title: Compulsory repayments
child_links.description: How and when compulsory repayments of your study and training support loan are made through the income tax system.

child_links.title: Voluntary repayments
child_links.description: You can make voluntary repayments at any time to help reduce your study or training loan balance.

child_links.title: Overseas obligations when repaying loans
child_links.description: Provide an overseas travel notification and report your worldwide income if you have a study or training support loan.

child_links.title: Deferring repayments
child_links.description: You may apply to defer your compulsory repayment or overseas levy if you are in serious hardship or for other reasons.

child_links.title: Study and training loans – what's new
child_links.description: See changes related to any new legislation for student and training support debts.
